title: Ukrainian Callaloo Pilaf
description: A hearty and flavorful Ukrainian-inspired pilaf dish made with sautéed callaloo and served with crispy garlicky flatbread.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped callaloo and cook until wilted.
Add the Ukrainian pilaf mix and cook according to package instructions.
Season with flaky salt to taste.
Serve with crispy garlicky flatbread on top.
